inline.description: Field-level errors highlighting the conflicting values
inline.usage: Multi-step forms with business rule validation

summary.description: Error summary at the top of the form listing all conflicts
summary.usage: Long forms where inline errors may be off-screen

figmaNote: Distinguish from 400 validation errors in copy tone: 422 means the server understood the request but rejected it for business reasons — avoid 'invalid format' language.
